---
package: "openpipeline"
version: "v4.2.0"
title: "create_pseudobulk"
namespace: "Differential expression"
description: "Generation of pseudobulk samples from single-cell transcriptomics data, by aggregating raw gene expression counts from individual cells to create  bulk-like expression profiles suitable for differential expression analysis with methods designed for bulk differential expression analysis."
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline v4.2.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `create_pseudobulk`  
Namespace: `differential_expression`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline/tree/v4.2.0/src/differential_expression/create_pseudobulk)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/differential_expression/create_pseudobulk)

:::

Note that this componentonly considers factors as explanatory variables, 
and excludes covariates from the analysis


## Argument groups

### Inputs

|Name            |Description                                                                                                                         |Attributes                                |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input`       |Input h5mu file.                                                                                                                    |`file`, required, example: `"input.h5mu"` |
|`--modality`    |Which modality from the input MuData file to process.                                                                               |`string`, default: `"rna"`                |
|`--input_layer` |Input layer to use. If None, X is used. This layer must contain raw counts.                                                         |`string`                                  |
|`--obs_label`   |.obs field containing the variable to group on. Typically this field contains cell groups such as annotated cell types or clusters. |`string`, required                        |
|`--obs_groups`  |.obs fields containing the experimental condition(s) to create pseudobulk samples for.                                              |List of `string`, multiple_sep: `";"`     |


### Arguments

|Name                   |Description                                                                  |Attributes                     |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--aggregation_method` |Method to aggregate the raw counts for pseudoreplicates. Either sum or mean. |`string`, default: `"sum"`     |
|`--random_state`       |The random seed for sampling.                                                |`integer`, default: `0`        |
|`--obs_cell_count`     |The .obs field to store the number of observations per pseudobulk sample.    |`string`, default: `"n_cells"` |


### Outputs

|Name                   |Description                                                    |Attributes                                 |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--output`             |Output h5mu file containing the aggregated pseudobulk samples. |`file`, required, example: `"output.h5mu"` |
|`--output_compression` |The compression format to be used on the output h5mu object.   |`string`, example: `"gzip"`                |

## Authors


  * Dorien Roosen [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/dorien-er) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dorien-roosen) (author)

  * Jakub Majercik [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/jakubmajercik) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/jakubmajercik) (author)

  * Dries De Maeyer [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/ddemaeyer) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dries-de-maeyer-b46a814) (contributor)

  * Weiwei Schultz (contributor)

## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/differential_expression/create_pseudobulk/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/differential_expression/create_pseudobulk).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/differential_expression/create_pseudobulk/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).
